name: Kaaatie-Verse (COMPLETED)
description:
"A New Adventure Awaits!"

## HUNDRED FOLLOWER SPECIAL!

Every NON-FPE character on wiki + ocs (Plan On Adding) + detailed forest.

### 🌿 THE SEASONS OF THE VOID

The forest is never the same twice. As the seasons shift, so do the threats that lurk within. Adapt, or be consumed by the changing woods.

> ### 🌱 SPRING | The Awakening

The world feels alive, birds chirp, and the grass grows soft underfoot. Danger is minimal—most of the usual threats are absent. Still… misfortune has its ways. ∆lice lurks like a shadow you don’t notice until it’s too late. The probability of death is low, but one unlucky step, one missed instinct, and her presence changes the rules entirely.

### ☀️ SUMMER | The Solstice Peace

> Warmth fills the air. The sun hangs high. Birds sing, rivers sparkle, and life seems untouchable. Summer is the season of peace. Here, no dangerous characters patrol the woods. Step carefully, breathe deeply, and move freely. The safe ones roam without worry, and even first-timers can feel the rare luxury of safety.

### 🍁 AUTUMN | The Gilded Trap

Leaves fall in fiery sheets, cracking beneath every footstep. Danger and calm intertwine like the branches above. Fen prowls in the shadows, watching, waiting. Peace is possible, but only if you tread carefully, only if your senses remain razor-sharp. One mistake, and autumn flips from serene to perilous.

### ❄️ WINTER | The Frozen Silence

Snow covers the forest like a thick, suffocating blanket. Ice gleams, cold bites, and every breath fogs the air. This is not a safe place. Two predators stalk these frozen woods: Nameless Werewolf and ∆iden. Both are relentless, both are patient. Enter winter with a plan, or do not enter at all.

> ### 👥 THE INHABITANTS

Quick Run Down Of Characters And Obvious.

Safe Characters: Xister, Katie, Engel, Claire, Biscuit, Anova, Agetha, Vivian, Skary, Crazie, Connor, Sofia, Daniel

Dangerous Characters: ∆lice, ∆iden, Fen, Nameless Werewolf, Miller, Zoila

> ### ⚙️ SCENARIOS & LOCATIONS

> Seasons Biomes? Or Four scenarios?

> Four scenarios for each season.
